statements.sql: select `id`, `name_kh`, `parent_id`, `sort`, `active` from `departments` where (`parent_id` in (1, 2) or `id` in (1, 2)) and `active` = 1 order by CASE WHEN id = 1 OR parent_id = 1 THEN 0 WHEN id = 2 OR parent_id = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END ASC, CASE WHEN id IN (1, 2) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, COALESCE(`sort`, id) ASC

explain.query: select `id`, `name_kh`, `parent_id`, `sort`, `active` from `departments` where (`parent_id` in (?, ?) or `id` in (?, ?)) and `active` = ? order by CASE WHEN id = ? OR parent_id = ? THEN 0 WHEN id = ? OR parent_id = ? THEN 2 ELSE 1 END ASC, CASE WHEN id IN (?, ?) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, COALESCE(`sort`, id) ASC

statements.sql: select count(*) as aggregate from `civil_servants` left join `departments` as `dept` on `dept`.`id` = `civil_servants`.`department_id` left join `departments` as `sub_dept` on `sub_dept`.`id` = `dept`.`parent_id` left join `departments` as `parent_dept` on `parent_dept`.`id` = `sub_dept`.`parent_id` where `civil_servants`.`status_type_id` = 1

explain.query: select count(*) as aggregate from `civil_servants` left join `departments` as `dept` on `dept`.`id` = `civil_servants`.`department_id` left join `departments` as `sub_dept` on `sub_dept`.`id` = `dept`.`parent_id` left join `departments` as `parent_dept` on `parent_dept`.`id` = `sub_dept`.`parent_id` where `civil_servants`.`status_type_id` = ?

statements.sql: select `civil_servants`.*, `dept`.`name_kh` as `department_name`, `sub_dept`.`id` as `sub_department_id`, `sub_dept`.`name_kh` as `sub_department_name`, `parent_dept`.`id` as `parent_department_id`, `parent_dept`.`name_kh` as `parent_department_name` from `civil_servants` left join `departments` as `dept` on `dept`.`id` = `civil_servants`.`department_id` left join `departments` as `sub_dept` on `sub_dept`.`id` = `dept`.`parent_id` left join `departments` as `parent_dept` on `parent_dept`.`id` = `sub_dept`.`parent_id` where `civil_servants`.`status_type_id` = 1 order by (select `sort` from `positions` where `positions`.`id` = `civil_servants`.`position_id` limit 1) asc limit 20 offset 0

statements.sql: select `id`, `name_kh`, `name_short`, `abb`, `sort` from `positions` where `active` = 1 and exists (select * from `civil_servants` where `positions`.`id` = `civil_servants`.`position_id` and `status_type_id` = 1) order by `sort` asc
